task.title: How to Add Transitions and Effects
task.shortdesc: Learn how to add transitions and effects in CapCut to create smoother scene changes and improve the visual appearance of your video.

taskbody.prereq: Before starting this task, complete How to Import, Arrange, and Trim Video Clips. Make sure your project contains at least two clips in the timeline.
taskbody.context: Transitions and effects can help make videos more visually appealing and engaging. Transitions create smoother movement between clips, while effects add visual enhancements that can improve the overall style of a video.

step.stepresult: The project opens in the editing workspace.

step.cmd: Locate the small transition icon between two clips in the timeline.
step.info: A transition can only be added between clips, so your project must contain at least two clips.
step.stepresult: The transition icon appears between the selected clips.

step.info: Common categories include basic, camera, slide, and motion transitions.

step.cmd: Select a transition and preview it.
step.info: Previewing allows you to see how the transition will appear before applying it.

step.cmd: Tap the checkmark to apply the transition.
step.stepresult: The transition is added between the clips.

step.cmd: Adjust the transition duration if necessary.
step.info: Shorter durations often work better for fast-paced social media videos.

step.cmd: Select either Video Effects or Body Effects.
step.info: Video Effects modify the appearance of clips, while Body Effects add motion-based enhancements.
Choose effects that support the purpose of your video rather than distracting from it.

step.cmd: Tap the checkmark to apply the effect.
step.stepresult: The effect is added to the video.

step.cmd: Preview the video to review the transitions and effects.
step.info: Watch the entire sequence to make sure the edits appear smooth and consistent.
step.stepresult: The edited video plays in the preview window.

taskbody.result: You have successfully added transitions and effects to your video. Your project now includes smoother scene changes and visual enhancements that can improve viewer engagement.
taskbody.postreq: Continue to How to Export a Video for TikTok or Instagram.
